prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily), Letrozole (2.5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 80.4 kg; Height 168.8 cm; BMI 28.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 135/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 7.7%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.9%; current 8.0%), FPG (12 months ago 171mg/dL; 9 months ago 180mg/dL; 6 months ago 207mg/dL; 3 months ago 194mg/dL; current 178mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 79.8kg; 9 months ago 83.3kg; 6 months ago 78.9kg; 3 months ago 76.3kg; current 80.4kg), Height (12 months ago 168.8cm; 9 months ago 168.8cm; 6 months ago 168.8cm; 3 months ago 168.8cm; current 168.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 27.0kg/m²; current 28.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 136mmHg; current 135mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 28U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 29U/L; current 24U/L), AST (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 11U/L; current 14U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; current 36mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 218mg/g; 9 months ago 225mg/g; 6 months ago 258mg/g; 3 months ago 269mg/g; current 230mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 73mg/dL; 9 months ago 76mg/dL; 6 months ago 74mg/dL; 3 months ago 78mg/dL; current 77mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 157mg/dL; 9 months ago 152mg/dL; 6 months ago 173mg/dL; 3 months ago 167mg/dL; current 162mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.7g/dL; 9 months ago 11.6g/dL; 6 months ago 12.4g/dL; 3 months ago 12.3g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
